title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: PINE EAGLE CLINIC GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services include general medical exams, women's health services, contraception, STD screening and treatment, diabetes management, immunizations and vaccinations, and more. 218 N Pine Street Halfway, OR 97834 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 742-5023 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 742-5023 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment; limited walk-ins available FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Also offers sliding scale fees. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker County Services: Childhood Immunization Contraception Family and Community Medicine General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Vaccine Information Well Baby Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PINE EAGLE CLINIC
